item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 141830Z AUTO 01005KT 340V040 CAVOK 10/06 Q1002 TEMPO 23010KT 4000 -SHRA BKN025TCU
🟡 TAF LFOT 141700Z 1418/1518 32007KT 9999 BKN030 TEMPO 1418/1420 23010KT 4000 -SHRA BKN025TCU PROB40 TEMPO 1418/1419 31015G25KT 2000 TSRA SCT020CB PROB30 TEMPO 1502/1506 4000 BR TEMPO 1512/1518 4000 -SHRA SCT040TCU PROB30 TEMPO 1514/1518 VRB15G25KT TSRA FEW040CB
